evals.prompt: My Flex protocol fails simulation because the trash setup is missing. Repair it through a simulate -> parse -> edit loop and stop if the next blocker is not code-editable.
evals.expected_output: Uses the simulation-first loop, fixes only the highest-priority issue, reruns simulation, and reports whether the latest simulation passed or what blocker remains.
assertions: Runs doctor or checks runtime readiness before guessing.
Fixes one issue at a time instead of rewriting the full protocol.
Does not claim success until simulation actually passes.
